message.content:
@startuml
participant "Programador" as P

participant "LEA" as LEA

    subgraph LEA
        participant "front: Ceed" as Front
        participant "agent: Ceed" as Agent

        Front
        Agent
    endsub

    P -> Front : ws://lea
    Front -> Front : see('listen', port)
    Front -> Agent : see('onSocketConnection', socket)
    Front -> P : socket.emit(agents)
    P -> Front : see(agent, action, args)
    Front -> Agent : see(action, args)
    Agent -> Front : resolve()
    Front -> P : http://lea/:agent/:action
    Front -> Front : see('http', [req, res])
    Front -> Agent : see(action, [req, res])
    Agent -> Front : res.send()

@enduml
